channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to Choose the Best Health Plan
What to Do When Your Claim Is Denied
Strategies for Smarter Health Spending
item.description: Learn how to choose the right plan and navigate health insurance with confidence at every stage of life.

item.title: Cheesy Jalapeño Cashew Dressing
item.description: Move over, Ranch, there’s a new creamy dressing in town that’s stealing our hearts! This cheesy jalapeño cashew dressing is our new go-to for salads, ...

item.title: An iPhone-hacking toolkit used by Russian spies likely came from U.S military contractor
item.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. govern...

item.title: 8 Best Cheap Phones (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: There’s little reason to pay top dollar for a smartphone. These iPhones and Android devices—ranging from $100 to $600—stood up to WIRED’s testing.

item.title: Kind Restaurant Owners Take Entire Staff on Paid Bahamas Vacation
item.description: As the busy holiday period wound to a close at The Standard restaurant in Toledo, the owners surprised their staff with a three-day cruise to the Baha...

item.title: Whoop launches a new blood test focused on women’s health
item.description: The wearable maker is launching a new panel focused on women's health through its Whoop Labs blood testing service. It's also adding a new feature to ...

item.title: Apple now makes one in four iPhones in India: report
item.description: Apple reportedly produced 55 million units in India last year, a shift accelerated as Apple faced growing uncertainty in China.

item.title: How to Responsibly Dispose of Your Electronics (2026)
item.description: Get rid of old, broken, and unused devices—even Lightning cables—without adding to the e-waste problem.

item.title: Good News in History, March 10
item.description: Happy Birthday to Hollywood star Jon Hamm who turns 55 today. He rocketed to fame playing the 60s advertising executive Don Draper in the TV hit Mad M...

item.title: How Can a Locomotive Pull a Long Train That’s Much Heavier?
item.description: For railroads, it’s all about managing static and kinetic friction.

item.title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
item.description: AMI Labs, the new venture cofounded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after he left Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuati...

item.title: Uzbekistan’s Uzum valuation leaps over 50% in seven months to $2.3B
item.description: Uzum now reaches 20 million users and processes $11B in payments as it expands its e-commerce and fintech ecosystem across Uzbekistan.

item.title: The Best Streaming Bundles and Streaming Deals of March 2026
item.description: Here are the current best bundles from the most popular services.

item.title: Use Microsoft PC Manager to Speed Up Your Windows 11 Computer
item.description: Can you really get a Windows PC running like new again? Using this free tool from Microsoft, you can get pretty close.

item.title: BofA Business Advantage Unlimited card review: 1.5% cash back
item.description: The BofA Business Advantage Unlimited Cash Rewards Mastercard has no annual fee and earns 1.5% cash back on purchases. A simple card for small-busines...

item.title: How to earn Air Canada Aeroplan points
item.description: Want to earn Air Canada Aeroplan points? Here are all the ways you can earn Aeroplan points, some of which don't even require traveling.

item.title: TSA wait times hit 3 hours Monday as partial government shutdown drags on
item.description: Wait times at TSA checkpoints escalated Sunday as staffing crunches across the country left passengers standing in long lines to get screened.

item.title: Hertz Gold+: How to earn and redeem points for free car rentals, discounts and more
item.description: This guide covers the Hertz Gold+ program, including how to earn and redeem points and the low-down on elite status. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: How to earn and redeem the Atmos Summit's Global Companion Award
item.description: Learn how the Atmos Rewards Summit's Global Companion Award works, how to earn 25K or 100K awards and how to maximize companion redemptions.

item.title: Multiple Types of Plastic Are Turned into Vinegar Using Sunlight-Powered Process Without Emissions
item.description: Researchers at the University of Waterloo have discovered a way to turn plastic waste into acetic acid, the main ingredient of vinegar, using sunlight...

item.title: Marsupials Previously Thought Extinct for 6,000 Years Discovered: ‘A once-in-a-lifetime discovery’
item.description: GNN has reported a-plenty on animals that were last seen in the 20th century and believed extinct that were then rediscovered, but a story from the is...

item.title: Artworks Are Hidden Until it Rains in Seattle–Now it’s Sold Around the World
item.description: Ask anyone who lives in a rainy city and they’ll tell you that you just have to make the best of it. In Seattle, one artist did exactly that by making...

item.title: What grocery stores reveal about how people eat
item.description: A grocery store is one of the most revealing places you can walk into when travelling. More than restaurants or cafés, it shows how people actually ea...

item.title: What is considered a “normal meal” in different cultures

item.title: 63 Essential Things to Know Before Visiting Tokyo

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
U.S. productivity slows down in fourth quarter while unit labor costs accelerate
Beyond to buy rights to Buy Buy Baby brand and reunite it with Bed Bath & Beyond
